channel.title: Johannes Kiechle | Computational Imaging and AI in Medicine

item.title: Paper accepted at ISBI 2024
item.description:
Johannes Kiechle’s paper has been accepted to be presented at International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging 2024 Annual Meeting in Athens.

Johannes Kiechle will present his work “Unifying Local and Global Shape Descriptors to Grade Soft-Tissue Sarcomas using Graph Convolutional Networks”.

item.title: Abstract accepted at ESTRO 2024 (oral talk)
item.description:
Johannes Kiechle’s abstract has been accepted to be presented as an oral at The European SocieTy for Radiotherapy and Oncology (ESTRO) 2024 Annual Meeting in Glasgow.

Johannes Kiechle will present his work “Investigating the role of morphology in deep learning-based liposarcoma grading” on Monday, 06 May 2024.
